case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. VAN QUOC TRAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, VAN QUOC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-25-2019

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, VAN QUOC $1,597.83 PRINCIPAL, $293.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,891.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100084980)

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $437.33 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 210015526) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100084980) AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, VAN QUOC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, VAN QUOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037702), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED SEP-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, VAN QUOC
ATTORNEY DECLARATION RE: COSTS (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033) AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 100084980) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100084980) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-22-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
